name: odoo-semantic-skills
description: Odoo AI workforce toolkit — 28 skill personas + 3 specialist agents + 9 workflow commands across engineering, sales, marketing, strategy, onboarding, visual UI testing, and git-wave orchestration. Pairs with the odoo-semantic-mcp server for indexed-codebase grounding (auto-installed). Includes browser-automation agents for Odoo UI review and automated setup.

interface.shortDescription: 28-skill AI workforce for Odoo ERP — engineering, sales, marketing & strategy.
interface.longDescription: A comprehensive AI workforce plugin for Odoo ERP practitioners. Provides 28 skill personas covering Odoo development (coding, code review, frontend, testing), consulting (gap analysis, upgrade planning, risk overview), sales/pre-sales (bid response, competitive briefs, deal follow-up), marketing (content drafting, campaign planning, feature highlights), and strategy (discovery, onboarding, deployment checklists). Pairs with the odoo-semantic-mcp server for indexed-codebase grounding. Includes 3 specialist browser-automation agents for Odoo UI review, automated setup, and visual regression testing. Also bundles browser MCP servers (Chrome DevTools, Playwright, Pagecast) for rich UI interaction across Codex CLI and Gemini CLI.
